name: editorial-pivot
description: Two lightweight, no-build writing tools (plain HTML/CSS/JS) that turn a topic into a finished, human-sounding piece in four steps: outline, your personal angle, draft, then a cleanup pass that flags AI-sounding phrases and em dashes before an AI polish rewrites just the flagged spots. Drafts autosave locally as "case files" so you can leave one mid-draft and resume later.
